summary: Backend E2E testing for Milagros Transformacional App. 24/24 pytest tests passed. Verified: auth (login/verify/401), 365 UCDM lessons, Claude Sonnet 4.5 insight generation with framework quality markers (PNL/UCDM/Tony/Biblia) + MongoDB caching, full coach multi-turn conversation with context persistence (confirmed by follow-up 'color azul' recall), habits + checkin toggle, emotions, journal, planner, inner-child (6 exercises), metrics dashboard.

minor.issue: Items returned do not have a stable 'id' field (tests fell back to title). If frontend filters logs by exercise_id, ensure prompts.py INNER_CHILD_EXERCISES includes explicit id fields.
History replay via prompt concatenation grows linearly with conversation length, risking token-limit issues in long sessions. Consider summarization or truncation beyond N turns.
APP_PASSWORD compared in plaintext with no rate limiting; acceptable for personal-use app but flag for awareness.

action_items: (Optional) Add explicit 'id' field to each item in INNER_CHILD_EXERCISES so frontend/log can reliably reference exercises.
(Optional) Add a summarization step to coach history replay to avoid unbounded prompt growth.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 695 lines — consider splitting into routers/ modules (auth, lessons, coach, habits, etc.) for maintainability.
Coach AI history is replayed as plain-text in-prompt on every turn; combine with LlmChat's built-in session_id to avoid double context.
Lesson insight cache key only uses 'day' (no user), fine for single-user app but review if multi-user ever added.
Streak loop in /metrics/dashboard iterates up to 365 days with per-day find_one calls — could be a single aggregation for performance.
seed_data_creation: All test data prefixed with TEST_ and cleaned up within each test (create -> verify -> delete). A few emotion/coach entries may persist as they don't have delete endpoints and tests didn't force cleanup; safe for a personal-use app.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is fully green. Pytest file at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers all endpoints; re-run with: pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v. AI tests (lesson insight + coach session creation + multi-turn) take ~20-30s combined. Uses Claude Sonnet 4.5 via EMERGENT_LLM_KEY. Base URL read from REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL env.
